meta.title: ICS Security: June Month In Review
meta.description:
Marc Ayala joins Dale to discuss the three top stories and give their Win, Fail and Predictions. The stories are:
- WaterISAC Report (and SF incident) 
- Colonial Pipeline testimony in Congress 
- Quick hit on Claroty raise and Mandiant/FireEye split 

Join us and we will bring in your live comments and questions
